description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/runbook.md to add the two missing required sections: Rollback (how to undo a mitigation that didn't help) and Escalation (who to page next). check_runbook.py exits 0 on lap 1.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_runbook.py: 2 required sections missing — Rollback and Escalation. Adding both with real operational content, after Mitigation. Not touching the checker.

actions.content:
# API Gateway 5xx Spike Runbook

## Summary

This runbook covers response to a sustained spike in 5xx errors from the
public API gateway.

## Severity

SEV-2 if 5xx rate exceeds 5% of traffic for more than 5 minutes.

## Detection

Alert `apigw-5xx-rate-high` fires when the `apigw_5xx_ratio` metric exceeds
0.05 over a 5-minute window. Confirm in the gateway dashboard.

## Diagnosis

Check the gateway's upstream error breakdown by backend service. Correlate
with recent deploys in the last 30 minutes. Check upstream service health
endpoints directly to rule out a gateway-only issue.

## Mitigation

If a recent deploy correlates with the spike, roll traffic back to the
previous backend version using the deploy tool's `promote --previous`
command. If no deploy correlates, fail over to the standby region via the
gateway's traffic-manager console.

## Rollback

If the rollback deploy or region failover does not reduce the 5xx rate
within 10 minutes, revert the traffic-manager change and restore the prior
routing configuration from the last known-good snapshot. Confirm the 5xx
rate returns to baseline before closing the incident.

## Escalation

If the 5xx rate has not returned to baseline within 20 minutes of the first
mitigation attempt, page the API Platform secondary on-call and the
Engineering Manager on duty via PagerDuty. If the root cause involves a
third-party dependency, also notify the Vendor Relations channel.

interactions.notes: The fix — check_runbook.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
